productDisplayName: Lotto Men Dunk White Casual Shoes
description: Designed for superior performance and comfort, the lotto Dunk has a high heel counter to provide ample structural support to the ankle, protecting it from sprains and injuries. Coupled with an uber cool look, this shoe has a superior traction feature that makes the shoe a huge favourite both on the court and off it. If you enjoy donning that sporty look, simply pair these Dunks with jeans and casual tees.UpperPerforated toe uppers for added breathability and dry, fresh comfortHigh profile design provides ankle supportHigh ankle cup for added support and snug Fit to the backfoot and ankleMeshed and padded tongue and sockliner for snug fit and added protection from shockLace-up system for snug fitMidsoleFull length EVA midsole for added cushioning and impact protectionOutsoleHerringbone grooves on the outsole for added traction and absolute gripShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
